Cell.Data: The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.
Declare War with Normal Casus Belli (6-10[CasusBelli/])
Wypowiedz wojnę z normalnym casus belli (6-10[CasusBelli/])
This is listed as an item in the interface
Declare war on the other player using a normal Casus Belli. Your diplomatic state will change to war and your Popular Support will increase.
Wypowiedz innemu graczowi wojnę, korzystając z normalnego casus belli. Stan relacji dyplomatycznych między wami zmieni się na wojnę, a twoje poparcie populacji wzrośnie.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
Declare War with Minor Casus Belli (1-5[CasusBelli/])
Wypowiedz wojnę z pomniejszym casus belli (1-5[CasusBelli/])
This is listed as an item in the interface
Declare war on the other player using a minor Casus Belli. Your diplomatic state will change to war and your Popular Support will increase.
Wypowiedz innemu graczowi wojnę, korzystając z pomniejszego casus belli. Stan relacji dyplomatycznych między wami zmieni się na wojnę, a twoje poparcie populacji wzrośnie.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
Declare War with Major Casus Belli (11+[CasusBelli/])
Wypowiedz wojnę z poważnym casus belli (11+[CasusBelli/])
This is listed as an item in the interface
Declare war on the other player using a major Casus Belli. Your diplomatic state will change to war and your Popular Support will increase.
Wypowiedz innemu graczowi wojnę, korzystając z poważnego casus belli. Stan relacji dyplomatycznych między wami zmieni się na wojnę, a twoje poparcie populacji wzrośnie.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Declare war on the other player. This will change your relationship state to war and you will suffer a Population Support penalty.
Wypowiedz innemu graczowi wojnę. Stan relacji dyplomatycznych między wami zmieni się na wojnę, a twoje poparcie populacji zmaleje.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Offer a non-aggression pact in which both players retain a peaceful state.
Zaproponuj pakt o nieagresji, wskutek którego obaj gracze utrzymają pokój.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Offer a truce in which both players agree to cease all hostile action.
Zaproponuj rozejm, wskutek którego obaj gracze zgodzą się na zaprzestanie wrogich działań.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface

Become vassal of the other player. This effectively creates a fixed alliance with the other player which only the overlord can break. The deal only works if neither player is already a vassal. The overlord will gain an additional {INT_energy}% energy and {INT_research}% research per turn based on the income of their vassal.

Zaproponuj innemu graczowi, że zostaniesz jego wasalem. Spowoduje to zawarcie stałego przymierza, które może zerwać tylko suweren. Ta propozycja działa tylko wtedy, gdy żaden z graczy nie jest niczyim wasalem. W każdej turze suweren będzie otrzymywać dodatkowo {INT_energy}% dochodu energii i {INT_research}% punktów badań swojego wasala.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Offer a defensive pact in which both players try to aid each other in war.
Zaproponuj pakt obronny, wskutek którego obaj gracze postarają wspomagać się wzajemnie w razie wojny.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Propose an alliance with the other player. This is a mutual action, and both players need to share a defensive pact first.
Zaproponuj innemu graczowi przymierze. Zawarcie przymierza działa obustronnie i obaj gracze muszą mieć najpierw pakt obronny.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Break your non-aggression pact and revert back to a neutral state. This will incur some opinion and reputation penalties.
Zerwij swój pakt o nieagresji i wróć do neutralnego stanu relacji. Spowoduje to pewne kary do opinii i reputacji.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Break your defensive pact and revert back to a neutral state. This will incur moderate opinion and reputation penalties.
Zerwij pakt obronny i wróć do neutralnego stanu relacji. Spowoduje to umiarkowane kary do opinii i reputacji.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Break your alliance and revert back to a neutral state. This will incur heavy opinion and reputation penalties.
Zerwij przymierze i wróć do neutralnego stanu relacji. Spowoduje to poważne kary do opinii i reputacji.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Open borders to the other player.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Open borders to the other player for a fixed duration.
Otwórz granice przed innym graczem na czas określony.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Share vision with the other player.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Share vision with the other player for a fixed duration.
Udostępnij obserwacje innemu graczowi na czas określony.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
This is listed as an item in the interface
Share an intelligence pact with the other player.
Wymień dane wywiadu z innym graczem.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
Wymień dane wywiadu na czas określony
This is listed as an item in the interface
Share an intelligence pact with the other player for a fixed duration.
Wymieniaj dane wywiadu z innym graczem przez czas określony.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
I propose we forge an alliance so we may come to each other's aid in the call to war.
Proponuję, abyśmy nasze frakcje zawarły przymierze i udzielały sobie wzajemnie pomocy w czasie wojny.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
It is time we further our peaceful relations and ally ourselves in a defensive pact.
Pora wzmocnić nasze pokojowe stosunki i sprzymierzyć się w pakcie obronnym.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
We should forge a non-aggression pact.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Let us forget about the past and move into a new future!
Zapomnijmy o przeszłości i spójrzmy w nową przyszłość!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
I surrender my empire to you. Let us forge an alliance and work together with me as your vassal.
Oddaję ci swoje imperium. Zawrzyjmy przymierze i współpracujmy, a ja zostanę twoim wasalem.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
This relationship is over. I'll be coming for you!
Koniec sielanki. Zaraz stanę u twoich bram!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Your actions against me will not stand. You are next on my list!
Wasze działania przeciwko mnie są niedopuszczalne. Umieszczam was na czele mojej listy!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
You didn't think I would simply forget, did you?
Nie sądzicie chyba, że mam słabą pamięć, co?

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Your actions cannot be be forgiven. I will have my revenge!
Wasze działania są niewybaczalne. Zemścimy się!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
This alliance no longer seems favorable to me. This is where we part ways.
To przymierze już nie wydaje mi się korzystne. W tym miejscu nasze drogi się rozchodzą.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
This defensive pact was clearly not a good idea. Remember that I can crush your empire any time I feel like it.
Ten pakt obronny raczej nie był dobrym pomysłem. Pamiętaj, że mogę zmiażdżyć twoje imperium, gdy tylko najdzie mnie ochota.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
I need to have more independence. Our pact is over.
Potrzebuję więcej niezależności. To koniec naszego paktu.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Let us open our borders towards each other. This would greatly improve our mobility.
Otwórzmy granice naszych imperiów. Dzięki temu będziemy sprawniej przemierzać ten glob.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Let us share our vision so we can better assist each other!
Podzielmy się obserwacjami, żeby lepiej sobie nawzajem pomagać!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Sharing our intel will provide us with mutual protection!
Wzajemne udostępnienie danych wywiadowczych będzie dobre dla naszego bezpieczeństwa!

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Pozwól na budowę w zajętych sektorach
This is listed as an item in the interface
Allow the other player to build on claimed sectors.
Pozwól drugiemu graczowi budować w sektorach, do których twoje imperium wysunęło roszczenie.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
Allow building on claimed sectors for a fixed duration.
Pozwól na budowę w zajętych sektorach przez czas określony
This is listed as an item in the interface
Allow building on claimed sectors for a fixed duration.
Pozwól na budowę w zajętych sektorach przez czas określony
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
Let's fortify our positions. Allowing me to build near your borders will make us both stronger.
Umocnijmy nasze pozycje. Pozwól mi na budowanie w pobliżu swoich granic, a oba nasze imperia staną się potężniejsze.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
This is listed as an item in the interface

Become overlord over the other player. This effectively creates a fixed alliance with the other player which only the overlord can break. The deal only works if neither player is already a vassal. The overlord will gain an additional {INT_energy}% energy and {INT_research}% research per turn based on the income of their vassal.

Zostań suwerenem innego gracza. Spowoduje to zawarcie stałego przymierza, które może zerwać tylko suweren. Ta propozycja działa tylko wtedy, gdy żaden z graczy nie jest niczyim wasalem. W każdej turze suweren będzie otrzymywać dodatkowo {INT_energy}% dochodu energii i {INT_research}% punktów badań swojego wasala.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
Surrender to me and survive as my loyal vassal. Together, the world will be ours.
Poddaj się i przeżyj jako mój wierny wasal. Razem świat będzie należał do nas.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
The following modifiers are removed:[br/]{STR_modifiers}[br/]Trading these modifiers will remove them from the relation.
Usuwane są następujące modyfikatory:[br/]{STR_modifiers}[br/]Wymiana tych modyfikatorów spowoduje usunięcie ich z wzajemnych stosunków.
This is listed as an item in the interface

End the vassalage. This releases the vassal and reverts the relation back to a non-aggression pact. This action takes one turn and impacts your reputation and the opinion of both players toward each other.
Zakończenie podległości wasalnej. Uwalnia to wasala i zmienia stosunki z powrotem na pakt o nieagresji. Czynność ta trwa jedną turę i wpływa na twoją reputację oraz wzajemne opinie obu graczy.
This is a tooltip for a trade item in the trade interface
You have served me well as vassal, but I will now grant you more diplomatic freedom.
Służyliście mi dobrze jako wasale, ale teraz daję wam większą swobodę dyplomatyczną.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
I've served you long enough. Please grant me more diplomatic freedom and end this vassalage.
Służyliśmy wam już wystarczająco długo. Prosimy o większą swobodę dyplomatyczną i zwolnienie z podległości wasalnej.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

In the text below, text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
